verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ረሰይኩከ ፡ አምላኮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ይኩንከ ፡ ነቢየ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying, Behold, I have made thee a god to Pharao, and Aaron thy brother shall be thy prophet.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, See, I have made thee a god to Pharaoh: and Aaron thy brother shall be thy prophet.

verses.geez:
ወአንተሰ ፡ ንግር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአዘዝኩከ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ለይንግሮ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፈንዎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  እምድሩ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt say to him all things that I charge thee, and Aaron thy brother shall speak to Pharao, that he should send forth the children of Israel out of his land.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt speak all that I command thee: and Aaron thy brother shall speak unto Pharaoh, that he send the children of Israel out of his land.

verses.geez: ወአነ ፡ አጸንዕ ፡ ልቦ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአበዝኅ ፡ ተአምርየ ፡ ወመድምምየ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And I will harden the heart of Pharao, and I will multiply my signs and wonders in the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And I will harden Pharaoh’s heart, and multiply my signs and my wonders in the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወኢይሰምዐክሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወእወዲ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወኣወጽኦሙ ፡ በኀይልየ ፡ ለሕዝብየ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በበቀል ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao will not hearken to you, and I will lay my hand upon Egypt; and will bring out my people the children of Israel with my power out of the land of Egypt with great vengeance.
translations.kjv: But Pharaoh shall not hearken unto you, that I may lay my hand upon Egypt, and bring forth mine armies, and my people the children of Israel, out of the land of Egypt by great judgments.

verses.geez:
ወያአምሩ ፡ እንከ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ወእሰፍሕ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ዲበ ፡ [ብሔ]ረ ፡ ግብጽ
                  ፡ ወአወፅኦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እማእከሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And all the Egyptians shall know that I am the Lord, stretching out my hand upon Egypt, and I will bring out the children of Israel out of the midst of them.
translations.kjv: And the Egyptians shall know that I am the LORD, when I stretch forth mine hand upon Egypt, and bring out the children of Israel from among them.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ገብሩ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron did as the Lord commanded them, so did they.
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron did as the LORD commanded them, so did they.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ፹ዓም ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ፹፫ዓም ፡ አመ ፡ ተናገርዎ ፡ ለፈርዖን ።

translations.lxx: And Moses was eighty years old, and Aaron his brother was eighty-three years old, when he spoke to Pharao.
translations.kjv: And Moses was fourscore years old, and Aaron fourscore and three years old, when they spake unto Pharaoh.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.geez:
እመ ፡ ይቤለክሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ሀቡነ ፡ ተአምረ ፡ ወመድምመ ፡ በሎ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ እኁከ ፡ ንሥኣ ፡ ለዛ ፡ በትር ፡
                  ወግድፋ ፡ ቅድሜሁ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወቅድመ ፡ ዐበይቱ ፡ ወትከውን ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: Now if Pharao should speak to you, saying, Give us a sign or a wonder, then shalt thou say to thy brother Aaron, Take thy rod and cast it upon the ground before Pharao, and before his servants, and it shall become a serpent.
translations.kjv: When Pharaoh shall speak unto you, saying, Shew a miracle for you: then thou shalt say unto Aaron, Take thy rod, and cast it before Pharaoh, and it shall become a serpent.

verses.geez:
ወቦኡ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወገብሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወገደፈ ፡ አሮን ፡
                  በትሮ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወቅድመ ፡ ዐበይቱ ፡ ወኮነት ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron went in before Pharao, and before his servants, and they did so, as the Lord commanded them; and Aaron cast down his rod before Pharao, and before his servants, and it became a serpent.
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron went in unto Pharaoh, and they did so as the LORD had commanded: and Aaron cast down his rod before Pharaoh, and before his servants, and it became a serpent.

verses.geez: ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ለጠቢባን ፡ ወለመሠርያን ፡ ወገብሩ ፡ ሐራስያነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በሥራያቲሆሙ ፡ ከማሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: But Pharao called together the wise men of Egypt, and the sorcerers, and the charmers also of the Egyptians did likewise with their sorceries.
translations.kjv: Then Pharaoh also called the wise men and the sorcerers: now the magicians of Egypt, they also did in like manner with their enchantments.

verses.geez: ወወገሩ ፡ አብትሮሙ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ አራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወውኅጠቶሙ ፡ በትረ ፡ አሮን ፡ ለአብትረ ፡ እልኩ ።

translations.lxx: And they cast down each his rod, and they became serpents, but the rod of Aaron swallowed up their rods.
translations.kjv: For they cast down every man his rod, and they became serpents: but Aaron’s rod swallowed up their rods.

verses.geez: ወጸንዐ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአበየ ፡ ሰሚዐ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And the heart of Pharao was hardened, and he hearkened not to them, as the Lord charged them.
translations.kjv: And he hardened Pharaoh’s heart, that he hearkened not unto them; as the LORD had said.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ከብደ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይፈንዎሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, The heart of Pharao is made hard, so that he should not let the people go.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Pharaoh’s heart is hardened, he refuseth to let the people go.

verses.geez:
ወሑር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማይ ፡ ይወጽእ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወይቀውም ፡ ወተቀበሎ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ገበዘ ፡
                  ተከዚ ፡ ወእንታክቲ ፡ በትር ፡ እንተ ፡ ኮነት ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ፡ ንሥኣ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ።

translations.lxx: Go to Pharao early in the morning: behold, he goes forth to the water; and thou shalt meet him on the bank of the river, and thou shalt take in thine hand the rod that was turned into a serpent.
translations.kjv: Get thee unto Pharaoh in the morning; lo, he goeth out unto the water; and thou shalt stand by the river’s brink against he come; and the rod which was turned to a serpent shalt thou take in thine hand.

verses.geez:
ወበሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ አምላከ ፡ ዕብራዊያን ፡ ፈነወኒ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ ፈኑአ ፡ ሕዝቦ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፀመድዎ ፡
                  በሐቅል ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኢሰማዕኮ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዛቲ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt say to him, The Lord God of the Hebrews has sent me to thee, saying, Send my people away, that they may serve me in the wilderness, and, behold, hitherto thou hast not hearkened.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt say unto him, The LORD God of the Hebrews hath sent me unto thee, saying, Let my people go, that they may serve me in the wilderness: and, behold, hitherto thou wouldest not hear.

verses.geez:
ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ታአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ አነ ፡ እዘብ[ጥ] ፡ በዛ ፡ በትር ፡
                  እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ደመ ።

translations.lxx: These things saith the Lord: Hereby shalt thou know that I am the Lord: behold, I strike with the rod that is in my hand on the water which is in the river, and it shall change it into blood.
translations.kjv: Thus saith the LORD, In this thou shalt know that I am the LORD: behold, I will smite with the rod that is in mine hand upon the waters which are in the river, and they shall be turned to blood.

verses.geez: ወይመውቱ ፡ ዓሣት ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ወይጸይእ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ወኢይክሉ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ሰትየ ፡ ማይ ፡ እምተከዚ ።

translations.lxx: And the fish that are in the river shall die, and the river shall stink thereupon, and the Egyptians shall not be able to drink water from the river.
translations.kjv: And the fish that is in the river shall die, and the river shall stink; and the Egyptians shall lothe to drink of the water of the river.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በሎ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ንሥኣ ፡ ለበትርከ ፡ ወስፋሕ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ማያተ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወዲበ
                  ፡ አፍላጎሙ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አሥራጊሆሙ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ አዕያጊሆሙ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምቅዋመ ፡ ማዮሙ ፡ ወይከውን ፡ ደመ ፡ ወኮነ ፡
                  ደም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወውስተ ፡ እብን ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Say to thy brother Aaron, Take thy rod in thy hand, and stretch forth thy hand over the waters of Egypt, and over their rivers, and over their canals, and over their ponds, and over all their standing water, and it shall become blood: and there was blood in all the land of Egypt, both in vessels of wood and of stone.
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, Say unto Aaron, Take thy rod, and stretch out thine hand upon the waters of Egypt, upon their streams, upon their rivers, and upon their ponds, and upon all their pools of water, that they may become blood; and that there may be blood throughout all the land of Egypt, both in vessels of wood, and in vessels of stone.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ወአልዐለ ፡ አሮን ፡ በትሮ ፡ ወዘበጠ ፡ ማየ ፡
                  ዘውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ፍርዖን ፡ ወበቅደመ ፡ ዐበይቱ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ደመ ፡ ማይ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron did so, as the Lord commanded them; and Aaron having lifted up his hand with his rod, smote the water in the river before Pharao, and before his servants, and changed all the water in the river into blood.
translations.kjv: And Moses and Aaron did so, as the LORD commanded; and he lifted up the rod, and smote the waters that were in the river, in the sight of Pharaoh, and in the sight of his servants; and all the waters that were in the river were turned to blood.

verses.geez:
ወሞተ ፡ ዓሣት ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ወጼአ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ወስእኑ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ሰትየ ፡ ማይ ፡ እምተከዚ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ ደም ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the fish in the river died, and the river stank thereupon; and the Egyptians could not drink water from the river, and the blood was in all the land of Egypt.
translations.kjv: And the fish that was in the river died; and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river; and there was blood throughout all the land of Egypt.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ሐራሳዊያነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ በሥራያቲሆሙ ፡ ወጸንዐ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ለፈርዖን ፡ ወአበየ ፡ ሰሚዖቶሙ ፡ በከመ ፡
                  ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And the charmers also of the Egyptians did so with their sorceries; and the heart of Pharao was hardened, and he did not hearken to them, even as the Lord said.
translations.kjv: And the magicians of Egypt did so with their enchantments: and Pharaoh’s heart was hardened, neither did he hearken unto them; as the LORD had said.

verses.geez: ወገብአ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ቤቶ ፡ ወኢተንሥአ ፡ ልቡ ፡ ወበዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Pharao turned and entered into his house, nor did he fix his attention even on this thing.
translations.kjv: And Pharaoh turned and went into his house, neither did he set his heart to this also.

verses.geez: ወከረዩ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ዐውዶ ፡ ለትከዚ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይስተዩ ፡ ማየ ፡ ወስእኑ ፡ ሰትየ ፡ ማይ ፡ እምተከዚ ።

translations.lxx: And all the Egyptians dug round about the river, so as to drink water, for they could not drink water from the river.
translations.kjv: And all the Egyptians digged round about the river for water to drink; for they could not drink of the water of the river.

verses.geez: ወተፈጸመ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ዘበጦ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለትከዚ ።

translations.lxx: And seven days were fulfilled after the Lord had smitten the river.
translations.kjv: And seven days were fulfilled, after that the LORD had smitten the river.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ባእ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፈርዖን ፡ ወበሎ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ፈኑ ፡ ሕዝብየ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይፀመዱኒ ፡ (በሐቅል ።)

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Go in to Pharao, and thou shalt say to him, These things says the Lord: send forth my people, that they may serve me.

verses.geez: ወእመ ፡ አበይከ ፡ አንተ ፡ ፈንዎቶ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አነ ፡ እዘብጥ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አድባሪከ ፡ በቈርነናዓት ።

translations.lxx: And if thou wilt not send them forth, behold, I afflict all thy borders with frogs:

verses.geez:
ወይቀይእ ፡ ተከዚ ፡ ቈርነናዓተ ፡ ወየዐርግ ፡ ወይበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤትከ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ውሳጥያተ ፡ ጽርሕከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡
                  ዐራትከ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ አብያተ ፡ ዐበይትከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ሐሪጽከ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ እቶናቲከ ።

translations.lxx: and the river shall teem with frogs, and they shall go up and enter into thy houses, and into thy bed-chambers, and upon thy beds, and upon the houses of thy servants, and of thy people, and on thy dough, and on thine ovens.

verses.geez: ወዲቤከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ሕዝብከ ፡ ወዲበ ፡ ዐበይትከ ፡ የዐርግ ፡ ቈርነናዓት ።

translations.lxx: And upon thee, and upon thy servants, and upon thy people, shall the frogs come up.
